value.found_quote: We classify requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds... To help ensure safety in your use of the OpenAI API and tools, we run safety checks on our own models, including all fine-tuned models, and on the computer use tool. Learn more: [Model evaluations hub], [Cyber Safety], [Fine-tuning safety], [Safety checks in computer use]
value.rationale: The page directly substantiates all key elements of the claim: (1) OpenAI classifies requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds ("We classify requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds"); (2) dedicated safety checks run across model usage ("we run safety checks on our own models"), tools ("Safety checks in computer use"), fine-tuning ("Fine-tuning safety"), and cybersecurity ("Cyber Safety"); (3) escalating consequences for hazardous requests are described (delayed streaming responses → blocked model access for individual users → loss of access for the entire organization). The page presents this as a currently active, generally available system with no preview or beta language.
